allow: PowerShell($src = "D:\\Documents\\User\\‏‏הורדות\\אפריל מאי עבודה.docx"; Test-Path $src; $dest = "$env:TEMP\\plan_docx"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dest }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dest | Out-Null; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($src, $dest\); Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dest -File | Select-Object FullName)
